scripts.build: cp docs/CNAME /tmp/qpy-CNAME && cp docs/courses-cn.html /tmp/qpy-courses-cn.html && cp docs/courses.html /tmp/qpy-courses.html && cp -r docs/static /tmp/qpy-static && tsc && vite build && cp /tmp/qpy-CNAME docs/CNAME && cp /tmp/qpy-courses-cn.html docs/courses-cn.html && cp /tmp/qpy-courses.html docs/courses.html && cp -r /tmp/qpy-static docs/static
